meaning: A hot drink made from roasted and ground coffee beans.
A hot drink made by infusing tea leaves in boiling water.
A hot drink made with milk and chocolate or cocoa powder.
Strong black coffee made by forcing steam through ground coffee beans.
Coffee made with milk that has been frothed up with steam.
Coffee made with espresso and hot steamed milk.
Espresso coffee with a dash of frothy steamed milk.
Espresso coffee diluted with hot water.
Powdered green tea leaves dissolved in hot water.
Tea made by boiling tea leaves with milk, sugar, and spices.
An infusion made from herbs or spices in hot water.
Red wine heated with various mulling spices.
Savory liquid made by simmering bones, meat, or vegetables.
